name: The Flood
oracleText:
Choose up to one creature you control. Return all creatures to their owners' hands except the chosen creature.
Each opponent mills four cards.
flavorText: "All the high hills, that were under the whole heaven, were covered." — Genesis 7:19
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme art uses the public-domain Wikimedia Commons file "The Deluge".
